comment.body:
“The true left-tail opens at 6257.05 - 6228.68 range.
Vomma model says that a vol squeeze (based on the tailedness priced in) would take us to 6458.64 - 6488.77, but here we should expect potential gamma support due to long zomma. Still above the centroid. 
This tells me, that while a lot of hedging is going on, market expects the dip to be bought before falling through the peak long zomma. “
